result.summary: DataForSEO exposes a primary authenticated REST API at `https://api.dataforseo.com/v3` plus an official authenticated MCP server at `https://mcp.dataforseo.com/mcp`; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
result.description: DataForSEO provides SEO, search, advertising, backlink, review, app, business, merchant, and AI-related marketing data through APIs and databases. Its products are used to retrieve structured data from search engines, marketplaces, and review platforms for analytics and automation.

dfs_api_basic.label: DataForSEO API login and password
dfs_api_basic.setup: Create a free account at [DataForSEO registration](https://app.dataforseo.com/register), then open the [API Access](https://app.dataforseo.com/api-access) page in the dashboard. Copy your API `login` and auto-generated API `password` from there; this API password is different from your account password.

surfaces.name: DataForSEO REST API
surfaces.notes: The v3 docs describe a single REST API spanning SERP, keywords, backlinks, on-page, labs, AI optimization, reviews, app data, business data, merchant, domain analytics, content analysis, and related datasets. Sandbox endpoints are also documented under `https://sandbox.dataforseo.com/v3/...` with dummy data.

surfaces.name: DataForSEO MCP Server
surfaces.notes: Search snippets from DataForSEO docs say most supported AI clients use the streamable HTTP endpoint `https://mcp.dataforseo.com/mcp`. The public pages found here did not expose the exact credential binding mechanics for the MCP connection, only that it is the official DataForSEO MCP server for AI clients.
